description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is a solid color with a subtle geometric pattern and contains two prominent camera lenses and a flash arranged in the top left corner. The sides are slim and metallic, with no visible buttons or ports in the provided views. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, typical of high-end mobile devices. The device appears to be constructed from glass and metal, with internal components likely including plastic and electronic circuitry.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large front display, dual rear cameras, and a minimalist design in a muted color.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large, edge-to-edge display with a notch at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the slim profile and absence of visible buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying two camera lenses and a flash in the top left corner, with a subtle geometric pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim edge, also without visible buttons.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a geometric, abstract wallpaper in shades of pink and purple, with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are located in the top left corner on the back, arranged diagonally within a raised module.
